name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cut the French bread in half lengthwise and spread each piece with softened butter.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese evenly over one side of each bread slice.
4. Layer thin slices of Swiss cheese on top of the cheddar.
5. Place the garlic bread back into the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
